stories.title: Knicks Parade Recap — 2 Million Fans, Alicia Keys, Canyon of Heroes History Made
stories.angle: The morning-after recap: NYPD estimates 2 million fans lined Broadway from Battery Park to City Hall — the city's largest single-event police deployment ever (10,000+ officers). Jalen Brunson held the Larry O'Brien Trophy above the barrier so fans could touch it. Alicia Keys performed Empire State of Mind at the City Hall ceremony. Mayor Mamdani presented Keys to the City. The 1970 and 1973 Knicks never got a Canyon of Heroes parade — Thursday was the first in franchise history.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
2 MILLION fans. Alicia Keys singing Empire State of Mind. Brunson holding the trophy up for the crowd.

10,000 NYPD — their largest single-event deployment ever.

New York hasn't seen a moment like Thursday in a very long time. 🏆 #NewYorkKnicks

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The 1970 and 1973 Knicks never got a ticker-tape parade.

Thursday's Canyon of Heroes celebration was the first in franchise history.

53 years of waiting. One unforgettable morning. #NewYorkKnicks

article.headline: 2 Million Strong: New York Celebrates the Knicks' First Championship Parade in 53 Years

stories.title: Giannis Trade — Heat vs. Celtics, 4 Days to Draft Deadline
stories.angle: The Giannis trade deadline is June 23 — 4 days away. Knicks are officially out. It's down to Heat (Herro + Kel'el Ware + Jaquez + No. 13) vs. Celtics (Jaylen Brown package). Bucks not impressed with Heat offer. Celtics are on Giannis's list. Marc Stein says trade is "drawing near." Bucks want a deal before draft night.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Giannis trade deadline is June 23 — 4 days away.

Heat have momentum (Herro + picks). Celtics on his list (Jaylen Brown package).

Bucks not impressed with Miami's offer. This is far from done. #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Marc Stein says a Giannis trade is "drawing near."

The Bucks want a deal done before the June 23 draft.

Knicks are out. It's Heat or Celtics. 4 days to find out. #NBA #GiannisAntetokounmpo

stories.title: NBA Draft — 4 Days Away, Dybantsa Still -450, Peterson Medicals Cleared
stories.angle: Draft in 4 days at Barclays Center. AJ Dybantsa -450 odds No. 1 to Wizards; completed both Wizards and Jazz visits. Darryn Peterson medicals came back clean — no major red flags — projected No. 2 to Utah Jazz. Trae Young expected to reject $49M option and renegotiate with Washington long-term.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
NBA Draft is 4 days away.

AJ Dybantsa: -450 to go No. 1 to Washington.
Darryn Peterson: medicals cleared, no red flags for No. 2 Utah.

Dybantsa completed his Wizards AND Jazz visits. Barclays Center, June 23. 🏀 #NBADraft

stories.title: Austin Reaves — Lakers Widely Expected to Retain, Deal Around $200M
stories.angle: Reaves will decline $14.9M player option by June 29. League expects a Lakers deal around $200M (5yr/$239M max advantage vs. Nets' 4yr/$178.5M). Nets fading as credible threat. Luka Doncic partnership and LA affection drive Lakers confidence. Reaves averaged 23.3 PPG last season.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The league expects Austin Reaves to stay with the Lakers on a deal around $200M.

Lakers advantage: 5 years vs. Nets' 4 years.
Reaves advantage: Luka. LA. Home.

He declines his $14.9M option by June 29. #LakersNation

article.headline: Why Austin Reaves Is Staying in LA: The Case for a Lakers Homecoming

stories.title: Ja Morant Trade Market — Memphis Waiting on Giannis, Heat as Fallback
stories.angle: Grizzlies holding off until Giannis deal closes before entering Morant trade market. Heat reportedly interested in Morant as Plan B if they miss on Giannis. Multiple teams circling. Could be the second major post-June-23 trade wave. Morant averaged 24.4 PPG last season.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Don't sleep on the next big NBA trade domino: Ja Morant.

Memphis is holding off until the Giannis deal closes. But once it does?

Multiple teams are circling. The Heat are reportedly a fallback option. #NBA
